description: Rise of Avalon Patch 7 (21 October 2020) — Corrupted Dungeons Update, Smart Cluster Queue Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeons: New Boss, Enemies, and Traps
sections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeons Demonic Harbinger Hellhound Demonic Mauler Demonic Predator Heretic Arbalist traps Abyssal Impaler Infernal Breach

subsections.heading: New Boss
subsections.searchable_text: Demonic Harbinger demon boss sword damage

changes.raw_text: Exceptionally powerful and wrathful demon general; wields a massive sword that inflicts heavy bash, slash, and shockwave damage
notes: Exceptionally powerful and wrathful demon general
Inflicts heavy bash, slash, and shockwave damage

subsections.heading: New Enemies
subsections.searchable_text: Hellhound Demonic Mauler Demonic Predator Heretic Arbalist

changes.raw_text: Relatively weak enemy, but can call other Hellhounds to itself
Demon with strong regenerative powers that can consume its allies to heal itself

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon Changes
sections.searchable_text: Demonic Shards Warlock Underlord Silence Hazard Knockback Hazard Heretic Thief Slaver

changes.raw_text: Rage bonus damage: 100% → 75% Invincibility removed during Rage cast

sections.heading: Smart Cluster Queue Changes
sections.description: Player sorting is now done per-party level, keeping parties together.
items: Party leaders can assign Party Cluster Access Priority
Preferred Cluster Access Guild Right removed
sections.searchable_text: Smart Cluster Queue party priority queue system

sections.heading: Disarray (Zerg Debuff) Changes
items: Reduces damage and CC when attacking lower Disarray targets
sections.searchable_text: Disarray Zerg debuff scaling changes level cap

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Axes Bows Crossbows Spears Swords Armors Helmets

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Magic Shock Range Cooldown Damage Silence

changes.raw_text: Damage close: 50.02 → 45 Damage far: 50.02 → 75 Rending Bleed Duration: 5s → 6s

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where mobs could not be indicated with party markers
Numerous graphical, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes mobs markers terrain UI localization
